Label: Name
Notes: Locked when DSP is running.
Hover help text in the status bar: Name of the current show.

Label: Location
Notes: Locked when DSP is running.
Hover help text in the status bar: Location of the current show.

Label: Input Channels
Notes: Locked when DSP is running. Reducing the count prompts a confirmation before removing channel settings.
Hover help text in the status bar: Number of Input Channels.

Label: Output Channels
Notes: Locked when DSP is running. Reducing the count prompts a confirmation before removing channel settings.
Hover help text in the status bar: Number of Output Channels.

Label: Reverb Channels
Notes: Locked when DSP is running. Reducing the count prompts a confirmation before removing channel settings.
Hover help text in the status bar: Number of Reverb Channels.

Label: Getting Started
Notes: Visible only when DSP is not running. Opens the Getting Started wizard.
Hover help text in the status bar: Open the Getting Started wizard.

Label: Audio Interface and Patching Window
Notes: Locked when DSP is running.
Hover help text in the status bar: Opens the Audio Interface and Patching Window.

Label: Processing Algorithm
Notes: Locked when DSP is running.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the rendering algorithm from the menu.

Label: Processing
Notes: Long-press to start. Long-press again (~2s) to stop. Locks all I/O parameters while running.
Hover help text in the status bar: Lock all I/O parameters and start the DSP. Long press to stop the DSP.

Label: Stage Shape
Notes: Defines stage geometry.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the shape of the stage (Box, Cylinder, or Dome).

Label: Stage Width
Notes: Visible when Shape = Box.
Hover help text in the status bar: Width of the stage in meters (Box shape only).

Label: Stage Depth
Notes: Visible when Shape = Box.
Hover help text in the status bar: Depth of the stage in meters (Box shape only).

Label: Stage Height
Notes: Visible when Shape = Box or Cylinder.
Hover help text in the status bar: Height of the stage in meters (Box and Cylinder shapes).

Label: Stage Diameter
Notes: Visible when Shape = Cylinder or Dome.
Hover help text in the status bar: Diameter of the stage in meters (Cylinder and Dome shapes).

Label: Dome Elevation
Notes: Visible when Shape = Dome. 180 deg = hemisphere, 360 deg = full sphere.
Hover help text in the status bar: Dome elevation angle: 180 = hemisphere, 360 = full sphere.

Label: Origin Width
Notes: Center-referenced coordinate system.
Hover help text in the status bar: Origin X offset from stage center (0 = centered, negative = left).

Label: Origin Depth
Notes: Center-referenced coordinate system.
Hover help text in the status bar: Origin Y offset from stage center (0 = centered, negative = front/downstage).

Label: Origin Height
Notes: Center-referenced coordinate system.
Hover help text in the status bar: Origin Z offset from floor (0 = floor level, positive = above floor).

Label: Origin Preset: Front
Notes: Sets origin to front-center of stage at floor level. Typical for frontal setups.
Hover help text in the status bar: Set origin to front center of stage. Typical for frontal stages.

Label: Origin Preset: Center Ground
Notes: Sets origin to stage center at floor level (all offsets = 0). Typical for Surround or Cylindrical setups.
Hover help text in the status bar: Set origin to center of stage at ground level. Typical for Surround or Cylindrical setups.

Label: Origin Preset: Center
Notes: Sets origin to volumetric center of stage. Typical for Spherical Dome setups.
Hover help text in the status bar: Set origin to center of stage volume. Typical for Spherical Dome setups.

Label: Stage Scale
Notes: Conditional: shown after stage dimensions change. Long-press scales all input positions proportionally to the new stage.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to scale all input positions proportionally to the new stage dimensions.

Label: Stage Fit
Notes: Conditional: shown after stage dimensions change. Long-press moves outlier inputs back within the new stage bounds.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to move outlier inputs back within the new stage bounds.

Label: Stage Dismiss
Notes: Conditional: shown after stage dimensions change. Long-press dismisses the prompt and keeps current positions.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to dismiss and keep current input positions.

Label: Origin Shift Inputs
Notes: Conditional: shown after origin change. Long-press shifts all input positions by the origin delta.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to shift all input positions by the origin change.

Label: Origin Shift Outputs
Notes: Conditional: shown after origin change. Long-press shifts all output positions by the origin delta.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to shift all output positions by the origin change.

Label: Origin Shift Reverbs
Notes: Conditional: shown after origin change. Long-press shifts all reverb positions by the origin delta.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to shift all reverb positions by the origin change.

Label: Origin Dismiss (Inputs / Outputs / Reverbs)
Notes: Conditional: paired with each Origin Shift button. Long-press dismisses the prompt and keeps current positions.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press to dismiss and keep current positions.

Label: Speed of Sound
Notes: speedOfSound = 331.3 + 0.606 * temperature. Updates automatically when Temperature changes.
Hover help text in the status bar: Speed of Sound (related to the temperature).

Label: Temperature
Notes: temperature = (speedOfSound - 331.3) / 0.606. Updates automatically when Speed of Sound changes.
Hover help text in the status bar: Temperature (gives the Speed of Sound).

Label: Master Level
Notes: Affects all outputs.
Hover help text in the status bar: Master Level (affects all outputs).

Label: System Latency
Notes: Total latency of mixing board and computer. Per-input/output latency is set in the Inputs/Outputs tabs.
Hover help text in the status bar: Total latency of the system (Mixing board & Computer). Specific Input and Output Latency/Delay can be set in the respective Input and Output settings.

Label: Haas Effect
Notes: Takes System Latency and per-input/output latency compensation into account.
Hover help text in the status bar: Haas Effect to apply to the system. Will take into account the Latency Compensations (System, Input and Output).

Label: Color Scheme
Notes: Black theme targets OLED displays. Light theme targets daytime use.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the color scheme: Default (dark gray), Black (pure black for OLED displays), or Light (daytime use).

Label: Long Press
Notes: Application-level setting. Stored in AppSettings, not in the project config. Toggles the long-press duration globally.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long press duration. Instead of confirmation windows this software uses long presses.

Label: Language
enum: English ; Francais ; Deutsch ; Espanol ; Italiano ; Portugues ; Japanese ; Chinese ; Korean
Notes: Application-level setting. Enum populated dynamically from Resources/lang/*.json. Full effect requires an application restart.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the user interface language. Changes take full effect after restarting the application.

Label: Dials and Buttons
enum: Off ; Stream Deck+ ; XenceLabs Quick Keys
Notes: Either/or selection. Only one dials-and-buttons device can be active at a time.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the hardware controller for dials and buttons: Stream Deck+ or XenceLabs Quick Keys.

Label: Position Control
enum: Off ; Space Mouse ; Joystick ; Game Pad
Notes: Either/or selection. Only one position-control device can be active at a time.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the hardware controller for position control: Space Mouse, Joystick, or Game Pad.

Label: Sampler Controller
Notes: Also writes SamplerEnabled (true when mode != Off, false when mode == Off). The Lightpad Arrangement and Remote Pad Setup buttons swap in next to this selector depending on mode.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or disable the Sampler feature for input channels.

Label: Lightpad Arrangement Setup
Notes: Visible only when Sampler Controller = Lightpad. Disabled when no Lightpads are detected. Opens the Lightpad arrangement overlay.
Hover help text in the status bar: Display the connected Roli Lightpads and allow for splitting them in 4 smaller pads.

Label: Remote Pad Setup
Notes: Visible only when Sampler Controller = Remote. Opens an overlay to choose the Remote XY-pad layout (3x2 or 5x3).
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the number of pads in the Remote's XY Pads tab.

Label: Binaural Enable
Notes: Long-press to toggle. Disabled (50% alpha) when no Binaural Output channel is selected.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or disable the binaural renderer processing.

Label: Binaural Output
Notes: First output channel of the stereo pair. -1 = disabled. Enum rebuilt dynamically from output patch state.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select output channel pair for binaural monitoring. Off disables binaural output.

Label: Listener Distance
Notes: Distance from stage origin along the listener's facing direction.
Hover help text in the status bar: Distance of binaural listener from stage origin (meters).

Label: Listener Angle
Notes: 0 degrees = facing stage origin. Integer degrees only.
Hover help text in the status bar: Horizontal rotation of binaural listener view (degrees, 0 = facing stage).

Label: Binaural Level
Notes: Overall level offset for the binaural output.
Hover help text in the status bar: Overall level offset for binaural output (dB).

Label: Binaural Delay
Notes: Additional delay applied to the binaural output.
Hover help text in the status bar: Additional delay for binaural output (milliseconds).

Label: Solo Mode
Notes: Single = only one input soloed at a time (clicking S clears others). Multi = multiple simultaneous solos.
Hover help text in the status bar: Single: one input at a time. Multi: multiple inputs simultaneously.

Label: Select Project Folder
Notes: Long-press. Opens a folder picker. Required before Store / Reload.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the Location of the Current Project Folder where to store files.

Label: Store Complete Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Writes all configs (system, inputs, outputs, reverbs, clusters, map, network, audio patch) with a backup.
Hover help text in the status bar: Store Complete Configuration to files (with backup).

Label: Reload Complete Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Reloads all configs from files in the project folder.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Complete Configuration from files.

Label: Reload Complete Config Backup
Notes: Long-press. Reloads all configs from backup files in the project folder.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Complete Configuration from backup files.

Label: Store System Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Writes only the system configuration (Show, I/O, Stage, Master, UI, Controllers, Binaural) with a backup.
Hover help text in the status bar: Store System Configuration to file (with backup).

Label: Reload System Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Reloads the system configuration from file.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload System Configuration from file.

Label: Reload System Config Backup
Notes: Long-press. Reloads the system configuration from the backup file.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload System Configuration from backup file.

Label: Import System Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Opens a file picker to import a system configuration from any location.
Hover help text in the status bar: Import System Configuration from file (with file explorer window).

Label: Export System Configuration
Notes: Long-press. Opens a file picker to export the current system configuration to any location.
Hover help text in the status bar: Export System Configuration to file (with file explorer window).

Label: Version
Notes: Read-only. Displays the running application version.
Hover help text in the status bar: Current application version.

Label: Update Available
Notes: Visible only when a newer release is detected on GitHub. Clicking opens the release page in the browser.
Hover help text in the status bar: A new version of WFS-DIY is available on GitHub.

Label: Diagnostics Expand/Collapse
Notes: Long-press to expand or collapse the diagnostics sub-buttons below. State is not persisted across restarts.
Hover help text in the status bar: Expand or collapse the diagnostics controls.

Label: Export Logs
Notes: Visible only when Diagnostics is expanded. Exports WFS-DIY log files to a chosen folder.
Hover help text in the status bar: Export WFS-DIY log files.

Label: Open Log Folder
Notes: Visible only when Diagnostics is expanded. Opens the log directory in the OS file explorer.
Hover help text in the status bar: Open the WFS-DIY log folder in the OS file explorer.

Label: Copy System Info
Notes: Visible only when Diagnostics is expanded. Copies OS / audio device / WFS version info to the clipboard.
Hover help text in the status bar: Copy system information to the clipboard.

Label: Report Issue
Notes: Visible only when Diagnostics is expanded. Opens the GitHub issue tracker in the browser.
Hover help text in the status bar: Report an issue on GitHub.
